name: aicortex-core
summary: AI Cortex: An LLM API toolkit for any language model through Ollama servers. Access Gemma, Mistral, Deepseek, Qwen, Llama, and more - completely free, zero-signup, zero API keys. Unified chat API, real-time streaming, multi-server orchestration, and OpenAI-compatible endpoints.
author: Erasmus A. Junior
